title: BMI (Body Mass Index) Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate your Body Mass Index instantly in your browser using standard WHO thresholds. For general reference only, not a diagnostic tool.
shortDescription: Calculate BMI from height and weight using WHO classification thresholds.

guideSections.heading: What BMI Does and Doesn't Measure
guideSections.body: BMI is a ratio of weight to height squared, designed as a quick population-level screening tool, not an individual diagnostic measure. It doesn't distinguish between muscle mass and fat mass, which is why a muscular athlete and a sedentary person of the same height and weight can receive the same BMI despite very different body compositions.

guideSections.heading: Why the WHO Thresholds Are General Guidelines, Not Universal Cutoffs
guideSections.body: The standard thresholds used here were developed primarily from population studies and don't account for age, sex-specific body composition differences, or ethnicity-specific research suggesting different risk thresholds for some populations. Treat the category label as a general reference point rather than a personal health verdict.

guideSections.heading: This Is Not Medical Advice
guideSections.body: This calculator provides a general reference number based on standard formulas. It is not a substitute for assessment by a healthcare professional, who can account for factors this calculation cannot.
